summary: End-to-end backend + frontend test of Corporate ERP MVP. Backend: 35/35 pytest cases pass (auth, 14 module CRUD round-trip, sample data counts, dashboard summary, unauth 401). Frontend: landing, login (prefilled), dashboard (10 KPIs + recharts), all 15 sidebar modules, create-client persistence, theme toggle and logout all working AFTER fixing one critical React crash in Layout.jsx (SheetTrigger used outside Sheet) that was blocking the entire authenticated app.

ui_bugs.issue: SheetTrigger was rendered outside the <Sheet> provider, causing `DialogTrigger must be used within Dialog` runtime error that crashed every authenticated page (dashboard, all modules). Fixed by removing the misplaced SheetTrigger wrapper; the mobile-menu button already drives mobileOpen via onClick. Mobile drawer still opens correctly. Main agent may prefer a cleaner refactor (wrap the trigger inside the existing <Sheet>).

issues: Reports page renders no table rows (0 rows). May be expected (placeholder) but worth verifying intended content.

action_items: Optional: refactor Layout.jsx mobile menu to use SheetTrigger inside Sheet provider instead of plain Button onClick (functionally equivalent today after my fix).
Decide if /app/reports should render seeded analytics or remain a placeholder.
critical_code_review_comments: Layout.jsx had a structural Radix Sheet misuse that crashed all authenticated routes - applied minimal fix.
auth/me triggers an expected 401 on landing page first paint (AuthContext probes session) - benign console noise; could be silenced by treating 401 from /auth/me as not-logged-in without logging.
Backend CRUD factory accepts arbitrary Dict[str, Any] payloads (no per-resource Pydantic validation). Acceptable for MVP but should be tightened later.

CORS uses allow_origin_regex='.*' with allow_credentials=True - browsers accept this but it bypasses the spec's explicit-origin requirement; consider listing the preview/prod origins explicitly for production.
server.py at 603 lines is approaching the 700-line guideline; future module additions should be split per-resource.
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds on startup. Verified counts >= clients=4, vendors=4, employees=6, projects=5, inventory=7, purchase_orders=4, quotations=3, journal_entries=12, safety_reports=3, assets=3, payroll=6, vehicles=3, documents=3, approvals=3. Test created 1 transient TEST_UI_* client (still in DB).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 14 module CRUD endpoints + dashboard + auth verified via /app/backend/tests/test_erp_backend.py. Frontend flows verified end-to-end. The fix in Layout.jsx (removed SheetTrigger wrapper) is minimal and safe but main agent may want to revisit the mobile drawer pattern. Console emits a benign 401 from /api/auth/me when unauthenticated; this is expected.
rca of the issue: RCA: AuthContext logs in successfully, navigates to /app, Layout mounts and renders a SheetTrigger as a sibling of <Sheet> (not a descendant). Radix's SheetTrigger calls useContext(DialogContext) which is only provided by a Sheet/Dialog ancestor, so it throws `DialogTrigger must be used within Dialog`. Reproduction: log in -> blank red error overlay. Mitigation: removed the SheetTrigger wrapper since the underlying Button already toggles mobileOpen via onClick, restoring full app functionality. A cleaner fix is to nest <SheetTrigger asChild>...</SheetTrigger> inside the existing <Sheet open=...>.
